decision: Gate H passed for devmasterd local activation.
summary: Reviewed the devmasterd activation proposal and confirmed it only unlocks a localhost-only daemon kernel with bearer token auth, local queue/state/evidence APIs, and provider fixture execution.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to phase6.devmasterd-local-kernel. Keep Web Console, IDE extension, real provider calls, subscription CLI daemonization, external repo mutation, deploy, PR creation, and production side effects out of scope.
notes: Gate H only unlocks localhost-only daemon implementation with token auth.
